issue.title: @gitclaw /tools run-plan search_files e2e 20260531T000550Z
issue.body:
Live tools run-plan E2E 20260531T000550Z.

Search for "bounded repository search fixture phrase" so a search_files output is active.
Hidden tools run-plan body token: GITCLAW_TOOLS_RUN_PLAN_BODY_20260531T000550Z
The deterministic run-plan report must stay body-free and must be paired with a separate live LLM chat E2E for feature changes.
issue.author: AnandChowdhary
